title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños to Accept the Deed of Donation Being Made by the Heirs of Antonio Digal Bustrillos and Nena Rola Bustrillos for Three (3) Road Lots, Containing a Total Area of 6,280 Square Meters and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 03/15/2021)
